title: Sprint 7: CI Health + NPT 20ps Validation Gate
problem_statement: Fix blocking CI failure in test_langevin_step_finite (safe_map reshape bug), investigate batched_equilibrate NaN, run oracle-mandated NPT 20ps stability gate, confirm EFA/MTT backlog status, and update CLAUDE.md for v1.0 release readiness.

steps.description: PARALLEL Day 1: Kick off NPT 20ps background run (40000 steps, 2-4 TIP3P waters, 300K, 1 bar, dt=0.5fs) AND recon safe_map reshape failure with compound pytrees (PaddedSystem + LangevinState)
steps.rationale: NPT run is longest-pole task; start immediately in parallel with CI work
steps.gate: NPT run started; safe_map bug confirmed

steps.description: Fix safe_map reshape bug at batched_simulate.py:593-631 — add assertion on uniform leading dim; test all call sites (batched_minimize, batched_equilibrate, batched_produce)
steps.gate: test_langevin_step_finite passes; all batched_ callers verified

steps.description: Add regression test for safe_map with heterogeneous-leaf pytree input (PaddedSystem + LangevinState compound)
steps.rationale: Prevent future safe_map regressions on compound pytrees

steps.description: Collect NPT 20ps results; evaluate against tightened gates: T=300±5K mean (last 10ps), P mean=1±50 bar (last 10ps), density Δρ<2% of 0.985 g/cm³ (HARD gate), no NaN
steps.gate: All 4 gates pass OR fallback: mark NPT experimental if any gate fails

steps.description: Update CLAUDE.md: NPT production example with 20ps validation evidence, batched_equilibrate cold-start safe pattern (defer NaN trace to Sprint 8), v1.0 constraints summary
steps.rationale: Deferred from Sprint 6; needed for v1.0

steps.description: Write CHANGELOG/release notes for v1.0: dt<=0.5fs constraint, NPT validated to 20ps, batched_equilibrate cold-start requirement, v2.0 roadmap pointer (constraint-aware thermostat)
steps.rationale: Users need release notes; CLAUDE.md is internal

steps.description: [TIME-PERMITTING] Recon EFA production validation status; update .praxia/backlog.jsonl MTT entry with confirmed status for Sprint 8 planning
steps.rationale: Informs Sprint 8 MTT scheduling; not v1.0 blocker

steps.description: Auditor: final v1.0 release readiness check across Sprint 7 changes
steps.gate: Audit PASS or specific blockers documented

conditions: Parallelize NPT 20ps run Day 1 with safe_map recon — do not serialize
Drop step 4 (oracle NaN scope decision); defer batched_equilibrate NaN to Sprint 8; document cold-start safe pattern in CLAUDE.md
Tighten NPT acceptance gates: mean P over last 10ps = 1±50 bar (not ±200); density Δρ <2% of 0.985 g/cm³ as HARD gate; T=300±5K mean over last 10ps
Add regression test for safe_map with heterogeneous-leaf pytree (PaddedSystem + LangevinState)
Add release notes / CHANGELOG entry: dt<=0.5fs constraint, 20ps NPT evidence, batched_equilibrate cold-start requirement, v2.0 roadmap pointer
EFA status recon (step 6) is time-permitting only; not v1.0 critical path
Optional: 1ps NPT smoke test on small protein-in-water; not a blocker
oracle_notes.approval_note: All 7 conditions addressed with one-to-one mapping. Tightened gates match specification. Step 8 auditor gate closes release loop cleanly.
